summary: Complete testing of 4 bug fixes in Jasper legal tech platform. All 4 bugs verified fixed. Backend: 7/7 tests passed. Frontend: All bug fixes and regressions verified via Playwright.

BUG 1 - Outcome Predictor cards renderin.evidence: Outcome Predictor now shows 3 scenario cards (Meilleur cas 65%, Plus probable 25%, Pire cas 10%) with probability percentages, titles, descriptions, financial impact, timelines. Frontend correctly maps API fields: favorable→best, neutral→probable, unfavorable→worst

BUG 2 - Deadline display on Cases list.evidence: Cases list now shows 'Deadline passed' (red), '9 days left', or custom deadline_description instead of raw dates like '2026-04-11'. Frontend computes daysLeft from deadline field.

BUG 3 - Lawyers page jurisdiction filter.evidence: Belgian user (test_cg@example.com) sees Belgian lawyers with Belgian bar associations (Barreau de Bruxelles, Barreau de Liege, etc.). French filter labels displayed. Prices in EUR.

BUG 4 - Timeline events translation.evidence: Timeline events translated to French for Belgian user: 'Dossier ouvert' (Case opened), 'Document televerse' (Document uploaded). Section title 'Chronologie du dossier'.

Document Library /documents.evidence: Two-column layout with sidebar, James conversation mode with identity bar, suggestion chips, recent documents

Legal Chat /chat.evidence: James header present, French UI labels, suggested questions in French, conversation sidebar

Dashboard /dashboard.evidence: Stat cards (Active cases, Highest risk, Documents, Next call), case list, upload area, available lawyers

Settings page.evidence: 5 tabs present: Account, Plan & billing, Risk Monitor, Notifications, Privacy

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working: (1) Outcome Predictor maps favorable/neutral/unfavorable fields correctly and displays 3 scenario cards with all details, (2) Cases list shows human-readable deadlines ('X days left' or 'Deadline passed'), (3) Lawyers page filters by user.jurisdiction showing Belgian lawyers for Belgian users, (4) Timeline events translated to French for Belgian users. HelloSign e-signature and Risk Monitor email connection remain MOCKED.

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/cases: Returns cases with deadline field for frontend computation
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/cases/{id}/events: Returns events with English titles for frontend translation
api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/lawyers?country=BE: Returns Belgian lawyers filtered by jurisdiction
